name: Natural refreshing halal sharbat | Indications, Pharmacology, Dosage, Side Effects & other Generic info with Available Brand names in Bangladesh
pharmacology: Sharbat Rooh Afza is a unique formulation prepared of time tested natural nutritive fruits extract by Hamdard, which is all acceptable as delicious, refreshing and relieves thrust. Hamdard's founder Hakim Abdul Majeed, invented this formula by using his utmost effort, far-reaching thinking and intellectual skills in 1907.
dosage__administration: Mix 3 tablespoonfuls of Rooh Afza with one glass of water to make it a delicious sharbat. It can also be used for making various recipes like Rooh Afza Ispaghol, Rooh Afza Sagudana, Rooh Afza Lassi, Rooh Afza Milkshake, Rooh Afza Ice Cream, Rooh Afza Faluda, Rooh Afza Phirni etc. It is better to use within one month of opening the cap. Do not refrigerate.
